summary: The SwingRatings algorithm indicates that AME is currently testing its Daily 50MA support zone near $225.33. Based on historical price action, bounces from this level have yielded a win rate of 35.3%. This is a fresh test of the support, suggesting that optimal buy-side liquidity remains intact. In the event of a successful bounce, traders should monitor overhead supply, particularly a primary horizontal resistance at $237.90 and a significant trendline confluence around $237.29 (formed by 4 points). This setup presents a structured risk-reward profile for swing positioning.
